name: The Death Dealer

sheet.name: The Death Dealer
sheet.background_story:
Since the first cycle, a series of legends mentioning an unstoppable Knight emerged. Although Knights were said to have carried out good deeds and fought to protect the lands from unjust gods and murderous thieves, texts referring to this knight often contained unspeakable stories of tragedy and murder. The story of this Unstoppable knight was carried on over the cycles and is known as the oldest legend in the lands. 

During the 18th cycle he was given the name The Death Dealer.

During the 18th cycle he was given the name The Death Dealer.
